creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to lightside from comment #23)
> (In reply to comment #22)
> > Really, we don't need cosmetic build output tweaking. Just no.
> > egrep '\[[0-9 ]{3}%\]' if you need.
> This is not my opinion, so don't we.

It is your opinion.  The goal of this is that the builds are always verbose.
